title: lantana gracilis
intro: Lantana gracilis, also known as the purple tip lantana, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, characterized by its compact growth habit and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, Lantana gracilis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lantana gracilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
